rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Moton To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 28, 2013, line 1. -DEFENDANTS AMERIPRISE BANK'S Moton To Dismiss For Failure To Amend, Or In The Alternative, Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. Defendant Ameriprise Bank's Motion to Dismiss is Granted. Plaintiff failed to file and amended complaint per November 11, 2011 Order. No opposition field. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDRANIK SHAHKARAMI VS. CHASE BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 28, 2013, line 4.- DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOUTH COUNTY BANK, N.A. VS. FIRST-CITIZENS BANK & TRUST COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 28, 2013, line 5. -DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST BANKERS' BANCSHARES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend as to first and third causes of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts giving rise to an actionable breach of contract. = (501/REQ)
